title: Tips for payments using Pix
excerpt: Escaping the hassle of credit cards, payments and installments can now be done using Pix. Mix Vale highlights key points to keep in mind.
body: Escaping the hassle of credit cards, payments and installments can now be done using Pix. Mix Vale highlights key points to keep in mind when using Pix to pay for installments. [Read here.](https://www.mixvale.com.br/2022/08/18/consumidor-pode-parcelar-os-valores-pelo-pix/)
